BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because org security settings are not enforced.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the same application scope.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Weak settings can lead to unauthorized data exposure.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Attacker could modify sensitive data by exploiting session/policy weaknesses.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Data at risk without enforced settings.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: System data may be altered due to lax security.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Security settings protect critical org data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Some availability impact if session settings are misused.
